exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your apartment hunting forward
items: Create a list of your must-have apartment features and deal-breakers
Research and bookmark 3-5 rental listing websites or apps specific to your target area
Calculate your maximum affordable rent using the 30% rule and create a realistic budget breakdown
Set up saved searches and alerts on your chosen rental platforms with specific criteria
Create a standardized list of questions to ask landlords or property managers during showings
Schedule and conduct virtual or in-person tours of your top 3-5 apartment prospects
